allow: Bash(python -c "import uvicorn; uvicorn.run\('backend.app.main:app', host='0.0.0.0', port=8000, reload=False\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 14960,32888 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 14960 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 3; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize")
